body_transformation: The curled spiral tail tip now glows with soft pastel pink light, its edges softened into delicate petal-like layers. Wing membranes shift to translucent crystalline textures with faint silver vein patterns, shimmering under gentle starlight. The robust body adopts a soft ivory white hue with a subtle lavender gradient, its surface smooth as porcelain. Rounded head features petal-like ear flaps with a delicate shimmer, while the neck retains its long structure but gains a smooth, velvety texture.
signature_feature: Tail tip: soft pastel pink petal layers with glowing starlight silver veins.
